ddls:
CREATE TABLE "road_types" (
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the road type (e.g., highway.motorway) */,
  "lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes in the road */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Maximum speed limit on the road */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the road */,
  "allowed_vehicle_classes" TEXT /* Classes of vehicles allowed on the road */,
  "one_way_default" TEXT /* Indicates if the road is one-way by default */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of road surface (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the road */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the road was constructed */,
  "last_upgrade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last major upgrade */,
  "total_length_km" REAL /* Total length of the road in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road type associated with the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., stop, yield, traffic light) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic signal */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic signal was installed */,
  "signal_status" TEXT /* Current status of the traffic signal (e.g., operational, malfunctioning) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "power_source" TEXT /* Type of power source (e.g., grid, solar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_road_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_type_id") REFERENCES road_types ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition record */,
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road type */,
  "condition_status" TEXT /* Current condition status (e.g., clear, under construction, closed) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last checked */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the condition */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of condition inspections (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "inspection_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the inspector */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the inspection */,
  "emergency_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the road is in an emergency state (e.g., flood, accident) */,
  "estimated_repair_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required for repairs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_road_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_type_id") REFERENCES road_types ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class (e.g., passenger, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  "weight_limit" REAL /* Maximum weight limit for vehicles in the class */,
  "height_limit" REAL /* Maximum height limit for vehicles in the class */,
  "width_limit" REAL /* Maximum width limit for vehicles in the class */,
  "length_limit" REAL /* Maximum length limit for vehicles in the class */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by vehicles in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road type being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "maintenance_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the maintenance team */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the maintenance quality (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_maintenance_road_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_type_id") REFERENCES road_types ("road_type_id")
)
